definition:
παρα-βαίνω 
 [in LXX for סוּר, עָבַר, פָּרַר, שָׂטָה, etc. ;] 
  1. in Hom. (twice), to go by the side of, stand beside. 
   2. In Æsch., Herod., Thuc., al., to go past or pass over, chiefly metaphorically, to overstep, violate, transgress (Jos.7:11, Eze.16:59, Sir.40:14, al.) : τ. παράδοσιν, Mat.15:2; τ. ἐντολήν, Mat.15:3; before ἀπό (as מִן סוּר, Deu.17:20, al.), to turn aside, fall away (cf. π. τῆς ἀληθείας, Arist., Cael., i, 5, 2): Act.1:25.†
 (AS)
